entities.name: Single Source of Truth (SSOT)
entities.context: Quality principle (P2) for maintaining exactly one canonical location for each piece of information to prevent drift and inconsistency

entities.name: Canonical Location
entities.context: The single authoritative place where a fact lives; all other references link to it rather than duplicating

entities.name: Reference Documentation
entities.context: Documentation that links to canonical sources rather than copying content

relationships.context: SSOT principle requires each fact to live in exactly one canonical location
Reference docs implement SSOT by linking to canonical sources instead of duplicating
